# Kodra WSL

> One-command Azure developer environment for WSL2

Kodra WSL transforms a fresh WSL2 Ubuntu install into a fully-configured Azure cloud-native development workstation in minutes. 25+ tools, 19 CLI commands, zero config. Built by [Code To Cloud Inc.](https://www.codetocloud.io)

## Quick Start

```bash
wget -qO- https://kodra.wsl.codetocloud.io/boot.sh | bash
```

## What Kodra WSL Installs (25+ tools)

### Cloud & Infrastructure (9)
- Azure CLI, Azure Developer CLI (azd), Bicep, Terraform, OpenTofu, PowerShell 7
- Kubernetes: kubectl, Helm, k9s

### Containers (2)
- Docker CE (no Docker Desktop license required), lazydocker

### Dev Tools (1)
- mise — polyglot runtime/version manager (Node, Python, Go, etc.)

### Terminal & CLI (13)
- Oh My Posh prompt, JetBrainsMono Nerd Font
- GitHub CLI with Copilot CLI for AI-powered terminal workflows
- bat, eza, fzf, ripgrep, zoxide, btop, fastfetch, lazygit, yq

### Shell Configuration
- Custom aliases, keybindings (inputrc), shell integrations
- Bash/Zsh completions for kodra CLI
- btop and fastfetch configs

## CLI Commands (19 subcommands)

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `kodra doctor` | Check system health and tool status |
| `kodra doctor --fix` | Auto-reinstall missing tools |
| `kodra update` | Update all 25+ installed tools |
| `kodra repair` | Interactive repair menu |
| `kodra repair --all` | Repair everything automatically |
| `kodra backup` | Backup configuration and state |
| `kodra restore` | Restore from a previous backup |
| `kodra cleanup` | Remove caches, temp files, old logs |
| `kodra dev` | Development environment management |
| `kodra db` | Database utilities |
| `kodra extensions` | Manage VS Code / tool extensions |
| `kodra install` | Install individual tools on demand |
| `kodra uninstall` | Remove individual tools cleanly |
| `kodra migrate` | Run version migration scripts |
| `kodra menu` | Interactive TUI command menu |
| `kodra shortcuts` | Show/manage shell shortcuts and aliases |
| `kodra motd` | Message of the day / status banner |
| `kodra refresh` | Refresh shell environment without restart |
| `kodra resume` | Resume interrupted installations |
| `kodra welcome` | Show the welcome wizard |
| `kodra fetch` | Show system info (fastfetch) |
| `kodra version` | Show current version |
| `kodra help` | Show all commands |

## Architecture

```
kodra-wsl/
├── bin/kodra              # CLI dispatcher (entry point)
├── bin/kodra-sub/         # 19 subcommand scripts
├── install/               # Tool installers by category
│   ├── cloud/             #   9 cloud/infra tools
│   ├── containers/        #   2 container tools
│   ├── terminal/          #   2 terminal tools
│   ├── cli-tools/         #   11 CLI tools
│   └── dev-tools/         #   1 dev tool (mise)
├── uninstall/             # Per-tool removal scripts
├── configs/               # Shell configs, completions, app configs
├── lib/                   # Shared libraries (8 modules)
├── migrations/            # Version migration scripts
├── docs/                  # Detailed documentation
└── tests/                 # E2E and website tests
```
